name: Terraria (TShock)
author: ops@refx.example
description: Re-Logic's 2D sandbox adventure. Runs the TShock server mod for plugins, permissions, and REST/console administration. No SteamCMD required.
startupDetect: Server started|Type 'help' for a list of commands

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl jq unzip
cd /mnt/server
VER="${TSHOCK_VERSION}"
if [ "$VER" = "latest" ]; then
  VER=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/Pryaxis/TShock/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name')
fi
URL=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.github.com/repos/Pryaxis/TShock/releases/tags/${VER}" | jq -r '.assets[] | select(.name | test("linux-x64")) | .browser_download_url' | head -n1)
curl -fsSL -o tshock.zip "$URL"
unzip -o tshock.zip -d /mnt/server && rm -f tshock.zip
chmod +x TShock.Server || true
mkdir -p /mnt/server/worlds
echo 'Terraria (TShock) install complete.'

variables.description: TShock release tag to install. Use 'latest' for the newest stable release.
Name of the world file to load or auto-create.
Size used when auto-creating a world (1 = Small, 2 = Medium, 3 = Large).
World difficulty (0 = Classic, 1 = Expert, 2 = Master, 3 = Journey).
Optional join password. Leave blank for an open server.

longDescription: 2D adventure and building sandbox powered by TShock — plugins, permissions and a thriving community toolset.
